title: [codereview-P1] lichen_hash_32 endianness and portability
description: link_ctx.c:515 lichen_hash_32 uses (uint8_t*)&sfn which assumes host endianness. Spec requires consistent byte order across impls (Rust/Zephyr/Python). Add explicit byte extraction with shifts or memcpy to ensure identical output on big/little endian. P1 correctness for rendezvous hash used in slot/channel calc. File as child of project-LICHEN-da2q.9.3. Run after every chunk.
close_reason: Fixed in chunk 1 after 3 codereview passes (P1 endian fixed with explicit LE bytes, P2 style cleaned, P3 test noted for next chunk). Hash now matches spec for rendezvous. Updated lichen/subsys/lichen/link/.
